message:
feat(demo_showcase): Add capability gating and resilience framework

- Add EffectiveCaps struct to track active terminal capabilities
- Implement capability computation: detected ∩ preset (interactive)
  or preset-only (headless)
- Track degraded features and show toast notification on startup
- Support capability presets: Auto, Ideal, NoTruecolor, NoMouse, Minimal
- Wire effective_caps to App for feature gating decisions
- Fix Rect.is_some() -> !is_empty() and Section::all() -> Section::ALL

The app now surfaces which features are unavailable so users understand
why certain functionality is disabled (e.g., "Degraded: mouse (preset)").

Refs: bd-1ob

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
